title: Section 4
content: In this Act,-- (a) "minor" means a person who has not completed the age of eighteen years; (b) "guardian" means a person having the care of the person of a minor or of his property or of both his person andproperty, and includes-- (i) a natural guardian, (ii) a guardian appointed by the will of the minors father or mother, (iii) a guardian appointed or declared by a court, and (iv) a person empowered to act as such by or under any enactment relating to any Court of wards. (c) "natural guardian" means any of the guardians mentioned in section 6.
